stem: A agricultural research study surveys 500 seeds planted and observes 141 positive outcomes out of 500 (28.2%). Estimate the true germination rate and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.282. Wilson 95% CI: [0.2443, 0.323]. Point estimate: 0.2837.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
